patch.value: pm get --json emits body as a SIBLING of item (top-level result.body), while description/acceptance_criteria live INSIDE item and pm list --include-body --json places body INSIDE each row. Agents read .item.body and find it null. Fix: include body inside the item object for both JSON and TOON get output, matching list, so .item.body works. Drop the top-level duplicate to stay token-efficient. Update MCP pm_get contract + golden + docs + tests.
GH-252: pm get --json places body outside item (parity with list --include-body)

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Fixed: pm get --json now places body INSIDE the item object (.item.body), matching pm list --include-body and where description/acceptance_criteria live. Removed top-level result.body. Updated get.ts GetResult type + assignment, MCP forwards automatically, docs/COMMANDS.md, and ~20 test files that asserted top-level .body across unit+integration.

patch.value: Moved body into the item object in GetResult; removed top-level sibling.
pm get --json exposes body at .item.body alongside description.
body was a top-level sibling of item; .item.body was null.
Fixed: pm get --json now returns body inside .item (parity with list --include-body).
